changeSet.author: ahri-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Add lifecycle linkage columns missed when 083-add-chain-of-custody-lifecycle-columns MARK_RAN on databases where chain_of_custody_log did not yet exist. 083 preconditions skip the addColumn when the table is absent; 062 applies the same columns once the table exists from 026-create-sample-retrieval-tables.

changeSet.author: ahri-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Allow storage lifecycle custody actions used during sample assignment.
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE clinlims.chain_of_custody_log DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_custody_log_action;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.chain_of_custody_log ADD CONSTRAINT chk_custody_log_action CHECK (custody_action IN ( 'TRANSFER_INITIATED', 'TRANSFER_RECEIVED', 'STORAGE_ASSIGNED', 'STORAGE_MOVED', 'CHECKOUT_REQUESTED', 'CHECKOUT_APPROVED', 'CHECKOUT_RETRIEVED', 'CHECKOUT_RELEASED', 'RETURN_INITIATED', 'RETURN_RECEIVED', 'RETURN_INSPECTED', 'RETURN_STORED', 'DISPOSED' ));
